name: Emerging
definition: Early commercialization or limited financial maturity.

name: Growth
definition: Scaled business with above-normal structural growth.

name: Mature
definition: Established business with durable scale and slower growth.

name: World Class
definition: Highest qualitative tier; formal rubric pending Milestone 3.

name: Leader
definition: Category leader with durable competitive strengths.

name: Strong
definition: Strong company with material limitations or cyclicality.

name: Watchlist
definition: Higher uncertainty, execution risk or immature economics.
